---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Propose a new capability, module, or enhancement for GOFAPS
title: '[FEATURE] <short description>'
labels: 'enhancement, needs-triage'
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Summary

Provide a clear, one-paragraph description of the proposed feature.

---

## Target Module

<!-- Select the GOFAPS module this feature belongs to -->
- [ ] 💰 Financial Management (GL, budgets, AP/AR, treasury)
- [ ] 👥 Human Resources & Payroll
- [ ] 🛒 Procurement & Contracting
- [ ] 🚗 Fleet & Asset Management
- [ ] 🏙️ Constituent Services
- [ ] 📊 Analytics & Reporting
- [ ] 🤖 AI / ATLANTIS.AI Integration
- [ ] 🔒 Authentication & Security
- [ ] 🌐 API / Backend Routes
- [ ] 🖥️ Frontend / UI
- [ ] ⚙️ Infrastructure / Deployment
- [ ] 🆕 New Module (describe below)

## Priority

- [ ] 🔴 **Critical** — Compliance or regulatory requirement; blocking production
- [ ] 🟠 **High** — Significant operational or citizen-service impact
- [ ] 🟡 **Medium** — Meaningful improvement; not time-sensitive
- [ ] 🟢 **Low** — Nice to have; quality-of-life enhancement

---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected? Quantify the impact if possible.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the desired behavior in detail. Include:
- What the user/system does
- What GOFAPS does in response
- What the outcome looks like

## User Stories

```
As a [government finance officer / HR administrator / procurement manager / citizen / etc.],
I want to [action],
So that [outcome/benefit].
```

- [ ] FedRAMP

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative approaches you evaluated and why they were rejected.

## Technical Notes

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Feature implemented and passing all acceptance criteria
- [ ] Unit and integration tests written (≥90% coverage for changed code)
- [ ] API endpoints validated (Zod), authenticated, and audit-logged
- [ ] UI implements loading, error, and empty states
- [ ] WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility verified
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, CHANGELOG, relevant guides)
- [ ] Compliance implications addressed and documented
